title: AN ACT RENAMING THE MAGALLANES SOUTH CENTRAL SCHOOL LOCATED IN MAGALLANES, SORSOGON, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO EDUARDO LEE CHAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 33005

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7608, June 11, 1992 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE MAGALLANES SOUTH CENTRAL SCHOOL LOCATED IN MAGALLANES, SORSOGON, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO EDUARDO LEE CHAN MEMORIAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Magallanes South Central School is hereby renamed as the Eduardo Lee Chan Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 14, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: June 11, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
